summary:
Comprehensive audit of radar/pipeline.py completed. Analyzed error handling, pipeline stage failure propagation, partial completion handling, and data flow correctness across all pipeline stages (scrape, filter, rank, backfill, store, report).

Identified 10 issues across severity levels:

CRITICAL (Severity 5):
- Line 241: Database operations (create_report, upsert_post, add_report_entry, mark_reported) lack exception handling. Connection loss or constraint violations will crash pipeline and may leave database in inconsistent state. Fix: wrap in try/except with rollback, use transactions, add health check.

HIGH (Severity 4):
- Line 322: Generic exception handler in _collect catches all exceptions but only logs errors. Pipeline continues with partial data even if multiple scrapers fail. No alerting for critical failures. Fix: add specific exception types, retry logic, failure threshold (e.g., exit if >50% fail), log tracebacks.
- Line 254: Email failure after posts marked as reported creates data loss - users never receive report but posts are consumed. No rollback mechanism. Fix: mark as reported only after email success, add retry logic (3 attempts with backoff), support resend-report command.

MEDIUM (Severity 3):
- Line 87: Backfill fetch_all_unreported may return stale/invalid posts with missing fields or broken metadata. No validation before serving. Fix: validate required fields (url, title, created_at), add age limit (skip posts >90 days old).
- Line 198: LLM summarization failures are silent - users expect summaries when llm_enabled=True but get unsummarized posts without warning. Fix: add llm_status to DailyReport, track success/failure per post, show warning in email if summarization failed.
- Line 176: Duplicate run guard check_duplicate_run is not atomic - concurrent processes can pass check simultaneously and send duplicate reports. Fix: use database locking (SELECT FOR UPDATE) or advisory locks, add unique constraint on (report_type, report_date).
- Line 233: Partial reports (< 5 posts) are sent without prominent user warning during scraper outages. Fix: add visual warning in email template, consider blocking email if all scrapers failed.
- Line 199: summarize_posts has no timeout - hanging LLM API blocks entire pipeline indefinitely. Fix: wrap in timeout (30-60s), continue with unsummarized posts on timeout, add llm_timeout config.

LOW (Severity 2):
- Line 72: Backfill deduplication uses url_hash but doesn't handle null values or verify deduplication between live and archive tiers. Fix: filter posts with missing url_hash, add integration test.
- Line 324: scraper.scrape() return value assumed to be List[RawPost] without validation. Buggy scraper returning None or wrong type corrupts pipeline. Fix: add isinstance check, filter invalid objects.

All findings include file, line number, severity, detailed issue description, and actionable fix recommendations.
